purpose: Reference site for influencer storefront builder - this is the template being replaced

hero.headline: Smarter Supplements. Real Results. Zero Guesswork.
hero.subheadline: Strategic bundles designed to work together—perfectly timed and scientifically backed.
hero.trustBar: Third-party tested. Made in the USA. GMP certified.

welcome.title: Welcome to Truva Nutra
welcome.body: We believe supplementation should be simple, not overwhelming. That's why we created strategic bundles — products formulated to work together synergistically, timed for your daily routine, and priced to actually make sense. No more guessing what to take or when. Just real ingredients, real science, and real results you can feel.

threeSteps.title: Three Simple Steps to Better Health
threeSteps.subtitle: Choose. Follow. Feel.

steps.title: Choose Your Goal
steps.description: Pick the bundle that matches where you're at — energy, fitness, fat loss, sleep, or vitality.

steps.title: Follow the Timing
steps.description: Each bundle comes with a simple daily protocol. No confusion, just results.

steps.title: Feel the Difference
steps.description: Products designed to work together = bigger impact than taking them alone.

whyBundles.title: Why Choose Bundles Over Individual Supplements?

reasons.title: Designed to Work Together
reasons.description: Products formulated for synergy. Combined effects are greater than taking them separately.

reasons.title: Save 15-20%
reasons.description: Better value than buying individual products. More impact for less money.

reasons.title: Simple Daily Routine
reasons.description: No guessing when to take what. Each bundle includes clear timing instructions.

quality.title: Quality You Can Trust
quality.body: Every Truva Nutra product is third-party tested for purity and potency, manufactured in GMP-certified facilities, and made in the USA. We don't cut corners on quality — because your health deserves better.

testimonials.quote: The Morning Momentum Stack is a game changer. I actually have energy all day without the caffeine crash.
testimonials.author: Lena M., 34

testimonials.quote: Best workout stack I've ever used. My strength gains in 8 weeks have been insane.
testimonials.author: Maria T., 29

testimonials.quote: Finally sleeping through the night. This stack changed everything for my recovery.
testimonials.author: Mark J., 36

testimonials.quote: This gave me the clean boost I needed to power through my workouts. I feel focused, alert, and lighter on my feet. It's become part of my routine.
testimonials.author: Ethan Wang., 42

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: From Nature to Nutrition - With Intention.
aboutUs.body: At Truva Nutra, we bridge the gap between natural wellness and modern performance. We believe supplements should work with your body - not against it - supporting balance, focus, and longevity. Every formula is crafted in the USA, third-party tested, and made with responsibly sourced ingredients. Because wellness isn't one-size-fits-all - it's a lifestyle built on small, intentional choices that compound into lasting change.

faqs.a: Truva Nutra is a premium wellness brand focused on bridging the gap between natural nutrition and modern performance.
All products are formulated and manufactured in the USA, using responsibly sourced ingredients and produced in GMP-certified, third-party-tested facilities.
Yes. Every batch is independently tested to verify ingredient integrity, purity, and quality.

faqs.q: Do your products contain artificial additives?
faqs.a: Our formulations are created with clean, science-driven ingredients. We avoid unnecessary fillers, artificial colors, or harsh additives whenever possible.

faqs.q: How long will it take to see results?
faqs.a: Consistency is key - most customers begin to notice benefits within a few weeks.

faqs.q: Are your products suitable for both men and women?
faqs.a: Yes! Our product line supports a wide range of goals for men and women alike.
Dietary supplements are not evaluated or approved by the FDA. However, all products are manufactured in FDA-registered facilities that follow GMP.

homepageContent.fdaDisclaimer: The statements made regarding these products have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. The efficacy of these products has not been confirmed by FDA-approved research. These products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

bundles.name: Morning Momentum Stack
bundles.tagline: Wake Up. Show Up. Win the Day
bundles.subtitle: Your Daily Foundation for Energy, Immunity & Gut Health
bundles.description: Start your morning the right way — greens, vitamins, and probiotics working together so you actually feel good before the day even begins. No crash, no slump, just clean energy and a gut that's happy. This is the stack your morning routine has been missing.
bundles.timing: Together in the morning (with or before breakfast)

bundles.name: Fitness Performance Stack
bundles.tagline: Train Harder. Recover Faster. Look Better.
bundles.subtitle: Complete Pre + Post Workout Power
bundles.description: Everything you need from the moment you walk into the gym to the moment you walk out. Pre-workout to fuel your session, creatine to build real strength, and protein to lock in your gains. Your workouts just got an upgrade.
bundles.timing: Pre-Workout: 30 min before training | Creatine: Daily | Protein: Post-workout

bundles.name: Fat Loss Accelerator Stack
bundles.tagline: Burn More. Bloat Less. Feel Like Yourself Again.
bundles.subtitle: Metabolism + Detox + Digestion Support
bundles.description: This trio tackles fat loss from every angle — boosting your metabolism, supporting digestion, and helping your body detox and reset. Less bloating, more energy, and a body that's actually working with you. Your transformation starts here.
includedProducts: ROC304 – Max Detox w/ Acai Berry
bundles.timing: Oxy Burn: Morning and pre-workout | Max Detox: Morning | Digestive Enzyme: With meals

bundles.name: Sleep & Recovery Stack
bundles.tagline: Wind Down. Sleep Deep. Wake Up Ready.
bundles.subtitle: Deep Rest + Stress Relief + Muscle Recovery
bundles.description: Because how you end your day matters just as much as how you start it. Magnesium, ashwagandha, and our sleep formula team up to melt away stress and get you into deep, restorative sleep every single night. Wake up feeling like a different person.
bundles.timing: Together in the evening (30–60 minutes before bed)

bundles.name: Men's Vitality Stack
bundles.tagline: Show Up as Your Best Self. Every Single Day.
bundles.subtitle: Testosterone + Performance + Mental Clarity
bundles.description: Built for the man who refuses to run on empty — natural testosterone support, complete daily nutrition, and razor-sharp focus all in one morning stack. Feel stronger, think clearer, and move through your day with energy that actually lasts. This is what peak feels like.
includedProducts: ROC506 – Ultra Test Natural Testosterone Support
bundles.timing: Together in the morning with food

structure: Formula Ingredient Deck (each ingredient with bullet points of benefits + citations)
Proper Use of This Supplement (dosage instructions)
Our Formula Vs Other Formulas on the Market (comparison section)
productDescriptionPattern.notes: Every product follows this exact same template. Science-backed with peer-reviewed citations. Each ingredient has numbered reference citations (e.g., (43,45)). This is a key differentiator - the credibility positioning.

homepage.heroStyle: full-width banner image with overlay text
homepage.ctaPlacement: hero, after welcome, after each bundle, about section

productPage.imageGallery: thumbnail strip with main image swap (7 images per product)
productPage.descriptionStyle: rich text with bold headers and bullet points

shopPage.productCards: image + name + price + Shop Now button

whatWorksWell: Bundle-first strategy - bundles featured prominently, individual products secondary
Goal-oriented navigation - 'Find Your Perfect Stack' with 5 clear goals
Trust signals everywhere - third-party tested, USA made, GMP certified
Alternating layout for bundle details keeps scrolling interesting
Science-backed credibility with actual peer-reviewed citations
Clean, nature-inspired color palette (forest green + sage)
Pill-shaped CTA buttons with high contrast
whatToImprove: Square Online platform is limited - no custom animations, transitions
Product images are all mockups/renders - no lifestyle photography on product pages
No subscription management UI (only Oxy Burn has subscription option)
Blog section exists but minimal content
Contact form is basic - no live chat
No social proof counters (customers served, reviews count)
forInfluencerBuilder: Template must support this exact content structure as the DEFAULT
Influencer needs to swap: brand name, logo, colors, hero images, about section, testimonials
Product catalog, descriptions, and pricing come from the shared Selfnamed/white-label catalog
Each influencer gets their own subdomain or custom domain
Builder must make it DEAD SIMPLE to customize - no coding required
Must look BETTER than Square Online - animations, transitions, premium feel
Must support subscriptions, bundles, individual products, and categories
Contact form should integrate with GHL CRM
Analytics per-influencer store for commission tracking
